name: No.1 Co.,Ltd
summary: No.1 Co.,Ltd sells and maintains OA and information security equipment. Its products include copiers and multifunction machines, business phones, computers, corporate mobile phones, LED lightings, network security and security products, and file servers. The company also provides IT support and office relocation services; design and printing services for advertising and sales promotion; and management consulting services, as well as Web site production and office mail order services. No.1 Co.,Ltd was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
